# 1:1 Template: The Kasvu Method

Use this template alongside `frameworks/02-1on1-kasvu.md`.

---

## Pre-session (leader fills in alone)

**Date:**

**Person:**

**How long since the last 1:1?**

**What commitment did you make in the last session?**

**Did you follow through?**

[ ] Yes
[ ] Partially: ___
[ ] No: ___

**What commitment did they make in the last session?**

**What do you already know about how their week or period has been?**

**What is the one thing you most want to understand better about this person coming into this conversation?**

**What is the one thing you most want this person to leave with?**

**What is your honest read on where they are right now?**

[ ] Growing and energized
[ ] Steady but plateauing
[ ] Struggling with something specific: ___
[ ] Disengaged
[ ] Going through something personal
[ ] Unclear, which is why this conversation matters

**Is there anything you need to set aside to be fully present for this person today?**

---

## During session (leader notes)

### Opening

**How did they answer "how are you actually doing?"**

**What did their body language or energy tell you before they said anything?**

---

### Reflection on the recent past

**What did they say went well?**

**What did they say did not go well?**

**What did they choose to mention first?**

**What did you notice they did not mention?**

---

### Deeper thread

**Which thread did you follow?**

**What did they say when you went deeper?**

**What question opened them up the most?**

---

### Development

**What skill or judgment do they feel themselves building?**

**Where do they feel stretched in a good way?**

**Where do they feel under-stretched?**

**Are they learning from someone right now?**

[ ] Yes: ___
[ ] No
[ ] Unsure

**Are they teaching or developing someone else right now?**

[ ] Yes: ___
[ ] Not yet
[ ] They had not thought about it

*(If not yet, this is the Echo Effect moment. Plant the question.)*

---

### Friction

**What did they say is slowing them down?**

**What did they not say but you sensed is present?**

**What can you remove, unblock, or change before the next session?**

---

### Closing commitment

**Their commitment:**

**Your commitment:**

---

## Post-session (leader fills in alone)

**What was the most honest moment in this conversation?**

**What did you learn about this person that you did not know before?**

**What did you do well as a listener in this session?**

**What would you do differently next time?**

**On a scale of 1 to 5, how much did this person speak versus you?**

[ ] 1 — I spoke most of the time
[ ] 2 — Roughly equal but I led too much
[ ] 3 — Roughly balanced
[ ] 4 — They spoke more, which is right
[ ] 5 — They drove the whole conversation, I mostly listened

**Where is this person in their growth right now?**

**What does this person need from you in the next 30 days?**

**What pillar needs the most attention for this person right now?**

[ ] Culture and Engagement — they need more trust or safety
[ ] Development — they need more stretch or investment
[ ] Process Improvement — they are stuck in friction
[ ] Experimentation — they need permission to try things
[ ] Quality — they need clearer standards or more pride in the work
[ ] Prospective — they need a longer horizon to work toward

---

## Session log

Use this section to keep a running record across multiple 1:1s with this person.

| Date | Their commitment | Your commitment | Key theme | Pillar focus |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
| | | | | |
